name: Chronos
full_name: Learning the Language of Time Series
paper: Chronos: Learning the Language of Time Series
description: The original Chronos family which is based on language model architectures. A time series is transformed into a sequence of tokens via scaling and quantization, and a language model is trained on these tokens using the cross-entropy loss. Once trained, probabilistic forecasts are obtained by sampling multiple future trajectories given the historical context.
